verdict: Eid Al-Adha demand is landing, but acquisition costs are running roughly 6x the food category benchmark.
diagnosis: Eid campaign drove 450 purchases this period, but cost per purchase of $204 is well above the $15–$35 food vertical norm.

signals.headline: Cost per purchase hit $204 this period
signals.detail: Latest day improved to $155, signaling the Eid creative is starting to find buyers as the holiday nears.

signals.headline: 392 leads captured at $7 each
signals.detail: Lead capture is the bright spot. Cost per lead sits well inside healthy food-brand ranges and feeds future email and retargeting.

signals.headline: Only 7 add-to-carts vs 769 page views
signals.detail: Under 1% of landing page visitors are adding to cart. Product page or pricing friction is blocking the funnel.

signals.headline: 419 Google reviews but rating not surfacing
signals.detail: Review volume is a real asset for a local butcher. Star rating field is empty in the feed and worth verifying.

signals.headline: Picanha Kabobs post drew 489 engagements
signals.detail: New cut announcement is the top organic moment this period. Worth amplifying with paid before Eid peak.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.body: Food and grocery is the cheapest DTC vertical for customer acquisition at $15–$35 per customer. Billy Doe's $204 cost per purchase this period sits roughly 6x above that range, even with the Eid lift.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.subheader: Eid Al-Adha demand peaks in late May
seasonal.body: Online Qurbani and halal meat delivery demand is forecast to rise up to 200% versus last year, with orders spiking in the final days before Eid. Reservations typically open 3–4 weeks ahead.

competitor.label: Competitor
competitor.subheader: US halal players push free shipping and Zabiha
competitor.body: Competitors like 4th Ave Halal Meat (free nationwide shipping, EBT online) and New England Meat Packing ($700 all-inclusive Zabiha Qurbani share) are leaning on transparent pricing and certification as the main hook.

recommendations.title: Test bundle pricing aimed at the free shipping threshold
recommendations.detail: Meat shoppers abandon carts at 81% largely due to shipping fees. Consider an Eid grill bundle that lifts order value over a free shipping line.

recommendations.title: Retarget the 392 leads with an Eid offer before peak
recommendations.detail: Cost per lead is healthy at $7. Worth testing an email and Instagram retargeting push to convert them before the final-days order spike.

recommendations.title: Put paid spend behind the Picanha Kabobs post
recommendations.detail: The new cut already earned 489 organic engagements. Consider boosting it as a Reel to a lookalike of recent purchasers while Eid intent is high.
